---
title: "Privacy Tradeoff Explorer"
---

This standalone tool complements the [hypothesis-testing blog post](../../blog-posts/hypothesis-testing/post.ipynb)
by letting you explore the privacy tradeoff for a Gaussian noise mechanism.

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false
from scipy.stats import norm

from libdpy.visualization.privacy_plots import PrivacyPlot

PrivacyPlot(
    sensitivity=1,
    std=1.5,
    distribution_types=[norm],
).embed()
```

Adjust the controls to see how the feasible region changes with the noise scale and shift
parameter.
